title: oplismenus strictus
intro: Oplismenus strictus, also known as poverty grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oplismenus strictus include its potential to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Oplismenus strictus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used as a topical application.
